# Litch Consulting

> Litch Consulting Limited is a professional finance firm in Lagos, Nigeria delivering
> financial reporting, modelling, taxation planning, forensic accounting, data analytics
> and advisory that turn complex numbers into confident business decisions.

## About

Litch Consulting combines deep financial expertise with practical, business-focused
solutions. The firm doesn't just deliver reports — it provides actionable insight tailored
to each client's needs, integrating reporting, modelling, taxation and forensic accounting
under one roof to improve decision-making, ensure compliance, mitigate risk and optimise
financial performance.

- Location: Lagos, Nigeria
- Email: info@litchconsulting.com
- Phone: +234 813 382 4779

## Services

- Financial Reporting — standards-compliant financial statements that give leadership a single, trusted version of the truth.
- Financial Modelling — dynamic models and forecasts that stress-test plans before capital is committed.
- Taxation Planning & Management — proactive tax planning and regulatory compliance that protect margins.
- Forensic Accounting — investigative accounting that quantifies risk and surfaces what the numbers hide.
- Data Analytics — dashboards and analytics that keep leadership ahead of compliance, risk and opportunity.
- Advisory — board-ready reporting and advisory for funding and growth decisions.

## Contact

Prefer to talk it through? Reach Litch Consulting at info@litchconsulting.com,
call +234 813 382 4779, or book a free 30-minute consultation at
https://www.litchconsulting.com/book.
